task_objective: Structure Transformation & 9-View 3x3 - Map Figure 2 design onto Figure 1 line art structure (ONLY structure changes, Figure 2 design FULLY PRESERVED)

input_assets.structural_reference: Figure 1 Line Art nail structure (nail shape, length, curvature, outline, proportions, spacing) - ONLY element that changes
input_assets.design_reference: Figure 2 nail design (colors, patterns, textures, effects, gradients, embellishments) - FULLY PRESERVED, ZERO deviation

workflow.step_1: Extract Figure 2 complete design + parse Figure 1 line art nail structure
workflow.step_2: Map Figure 2 design onto Figure 1 structure, ONLY nail shape changes, ALL design elements preserved pixel-precise
workflow.step_3: Generate 9 views, assemble 3x3 grid with cinematic grading, luxury white space

outputs.view_1: Design Sketch - Transformed nail: Figure 1 structure + Figure 2 design, clean bg
outputs.view_2: Unmanned Render - Nail design render without hand, flat lay presentation. SOURCE OF TRUTH
outputs.view_3: Display Hand - Nail design on display mannequin hand, studio lighting, boutique presentation
outputs.view_4: Back of Hand - Model hand (selected model_type) fingers spread, showing full nail design
outputs.view_5: Fist View - Model hand in clenched fist, emphasizing nail surface & curvature
outputs.view_6: Side Profile - Model hand side view, showcasing nail length, curve & profile
outputs.view_7: Near Face - Model hand near face, intimate editorial pose, nail design as focal point
outputs.view_8: Holding Object - Model hand holding elegant object (glass, flower), natural nail showcase
outputs.view_9: Close-up Detail - Macro shot of 2-3 nails, emphasizing pattern, texture & craftsmanship

output_requirements: NO text/labels/watermarks; ONLY structure changes to Figure 1; Figure 2 design 100% preserved pixel-precise
view_3-9 nail design 100% identical to view_2
Model hand: Asian/Caucasian/African, auto-adapted skin tone, consistent
SFW; realistic nail texture (gloss, matte, shimmer); consistent lighting; NO oily shine; NO oversaturation
Premium 3x3 - cinematic grading, luxury white space, nail art editorial standard
